prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为16226→19693→19725→25681→32093，呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约12368名；2025年基准位次约32093名，近年位次加速下 滑，反映出竞争加剧或学校吸引力相对下降；本省物理类计划2021年47人、2022年50人、2023年48人、2024年38人、2025年40人；2026年计划42人，较20 25年扩招2人（+5%），扩招幅度较小，对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年49→2022年44→2023年53→2024年46→202 5年45→2026年48，近年稳定在44–53名区间，属中上游211层次；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于该校硕士报考热度高（拟招3100人、报考预估破1.5万）， 教育学领域人气旺盛；抖音热度排名第67、评价为一般，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A+学科3个（世界史、教育学、马克思主 义理论），A学科1个（统计学），A-学科2个（生态学、生物学）；教育学A+与该校师范定位高度契合，马克思主义理论A+与思想政治教育等招生专业直接对应，对相关专业报考 有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度呈分化观望（2024年），计算机类仍为高热推荐（2024年）；本省物理类考 生2021年205920→2025年320192→2026年347000，2026年较2025年增加约26808人（+8.4%），竞争明显加剧；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，属东北地区；该校在湖南省招生占比约4.5%–4.7%（2021–2023年），2024年湖南省招生66人（占全国总 招生约4.5%），跨省招生规模稳定，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类考生增加约8.4%导致竞争加剧、2026年招生计划小幅扩招 5%的供需弹性，以及声誉偏正面带来的报考热度，在2025年基准32093名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约33256名，区间32756–33756名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 16226 → 19693 → 19725 → 25681 → 32093, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12368 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 32093, with rankings accelerating downward in recent years, reflecting intensified competition or a relative decline in the university's appeal; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 47 in 2021, 50 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 40 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 42, an increase of 2 (+5%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking was 49 in 2021 → 44 in 2022 → 53 in 2023 → 46 in 2024 → 45 in 2025 → 48 in 2026, stable in the 44–53 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of the university's master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applicants exceeding 15000), with strong interest in the field of education; Douyin popularity ranking is 67, rated as average, with moderate short video exposure; no obvious gaps in admission records; the fifth round of discipline evaluation includes 3 A+ disciplines (World History, Education, Marxist Theory), 1 A discipline (Statistics), and 2 A- disciplines (Ecology, Biology); Education A+ is highly aligned with the university's normal university positioning, and Marxist Theory A+ directly corresponds to enrollment majors such as Ideological and Political Education, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of normal/education majors shows divergence and wait-and-see (2024), while computer-related majors remain highly recommended (2024); the number of Physics Category examinees in the province was 205920 in 2021 → 320192 in 2025 → 347000 in 2026, an increase of about 26808 (+8.4%) from 2025 to 2026, significantly intensifying competition; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, in the Northeast region; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is about 4.5%–4.7% (2021–2023), with 66 students enrolled in Hunan in 2024 (about 4.5% of total national enrollment), indicating stable cross-provincial enrollment scale and insignificant regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category examinees in 2026 leading to intensified competition, the small expansion of 5% in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the positive reputation driving application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 32093, rankings are expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 33256, with a range of 32756–33756.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 32756–33756, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Class, Biological Science Class) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Experimental Classes, Mathematics Teacher Training) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Geographical Science Class, Environmental Class, Business English) as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<32756), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper bound (>33756), prioritize Tier 3 safety options.

学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is 48th, stable in the 44–53 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applicants exceeding 15,000), with strong popularity in the field of education; Douyin popularity ranking is 67th, rated as average; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 3 A+ disciplines (World History, Education, Marxist Theory), 1 A discipline (Statistics), and 2 A- disciplines (Ecology, Biology); World History A+ directly corresponds to the History major, Marxist Theory A+ corresponds to the Ideological and Political Education major, and Education A+ corresponds to Education majors, which strongly attract liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
